confirmed_contract: TC4 multiplies each 7..24 magnitude by an inclusive random integer in [-1,1]. Each axis may therefore be negative, zero or positive.
production_fix: WarpEvents.randomTc4AxisOffset routes the inclusive [-1,1] sign roll through TC4WarpRuntimeParity.signedSpawnOffset without removing the original zero outcome.
corrected_regression: The rejected boolean-sign adaptation removed zero axes and was reverted.
